a.blurb: Imagine a career where you only work four to six months a year, yet earn a full year’s salary.

b.quote: An easy read. It was very informative. It’s a good road map if you want to get in the Merchant Marines

hooksText:
Getting the Job
Two Pathways make a career at sea
Understanding Maritime Unions

seo.audience: anyone dreaming of a well-paid career at sea
seo.keyword: how to join the merchant marines
seo.keywords2: maritime careers, jobs that pay to travel
